title: NewWorld
description: 🌲Adds new atmospheric content to the overworld.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8XpQehpK/images/a97cbd21bc14060f088a97d7e4780e8eda4abed8.png)

🌲 Adds new atmospheric content to the overworld.
=================================================

NewWorld adds a new vibrant meadow biome, alongside new exploration content to make your journey more worthwhile.

Features:
---------

![alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8XpQehpK/images/f4fa4c2faf442848a82035652ef3888a02fa4a46.webp)

**The Wooded Meadow**, a new forest variant of the meadow that generates with fir trees and sports fancy foliage. Fir trees, which generate in wooded meadows and less commonly in taiga-like biomes. They come with a new brown wood set to complement any rustic build!


![alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8XpQehpK/images/debbc54a3faba210d114993257ff0048f4185f3a.png)

**Buried Bunkers**, which spawn in Plains and Meadows and almost always generate underground. You'll have to dig a bit to explore their secrets!


![alt text](https://github.com/krypt0graphy/New-World-NeoForge/blob/1.21.1/Screenshot%202024-12-21%20152245.png?raw=true)

**The Ancient Mattock** is a tool that can break stone, wood, dirt, and other materials efficiently. It's a great way to build effectively without cluttering your inventory with tools. 

**Craft one** by combining template pieces, found in Desert Temples, Trail Ruins, and Ancient Cities.
    
![alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8XpQehpK/images/faeec10719681a86629e0c2ddbe2dcdd16d20066.png)

**Tombstones** save your items when you die if kept in your inventory. You can find them as loot in Ancient Cities. Fun fact, it says R.I.P. on the front in illageralt!

![alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8XpQehpK/images/1daae9eba1d462d88bc4b90c6c201af164647336.png)

Tombstones are single use, but you can duplicate them using Illager Tomes, which are found in Woodland Mansions. Illager Tomes never run out, so you can use them as many times as needed.

![alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8XpQehpK/images/78b0d433a2917d115ba9bfb509151b4219a4c547.png)

Lush Caves got an upgrade, now with better foliage, as well as a new block, Loam!

![alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8XpQehpK/images/038fad67602676663afc264c128b0b10572646bc.png)

Check out these new blocks. Experiment with new block palettes! Farmer's Delight, Block Box and No Man's Land are compatible.

### Dependencies:

NeoForge & Fabric (1.6.0+) : [Biolith](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biolith)

Older Fabric versions: [TerraBlender](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terrablender-fabric)

Forge: [TerraBlender](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terrablender)
